description_long: This object depicts a highly distorted adult pedestrian figure, with exaggeratedly elongated limbs and neck, and a twisted torso. The figure appears to be wearing a modern, urban outfit consisting of a jacket with visible seams and patches, fitted pants, and shoes. The head is small and round, with what seem to be glasses or goggles, and the arms and hands are stretched unnaturally far from the body. The clothing features stylized details such as patches and straps, and the shoes have a sporty design. The overall form is warped, with limbs and accessories extending in improbable directions, giving the figure a surreal, almost abstract appearance. The surface texture is smooth and matte, with visible seams and stylized paneling on the clothing.
description: A surreal, distorted adult pedestrian figure in modern urban clothing with exaggeratedly elongated limbs and a twisted torso. The figure wears a jacket, fitted pants, and sporty shoes, with stylized details and a smooth matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twisted torso, elongated neck, and arms, with the face and upper body details most visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extreme length of the arms and the profile of the head and torso.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the jacket, the back of the head, and the extended limbs trailing behind.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the warped posture, with both arms and legs stretched outward and the body twisted.
attribute_clothing_type: urban jacket with patches, fitted pants, and sporty shoes
attribute_posture: twisted and distorted standing pose with elongated limbs
